title: Third skill instance — cross-repo-execution-shape (dev-pipeline, working-model)
description: Third of three foundational skills landing the skills meta-layer into operational use. Captures the 5-stage cross-repo flow seven-times-proven across the session arc: substrate-read -> sandbox-validate -> SR anchor land -> target-repo execute -> SR close. Composite of substrate-before-write (skill 1, the substrate input) and canonical-schema-authoring (skill 2, the validation discipline). Dev-pipeline scope. Lifecycle: working-model from initiation per memory rule 20.
